info.name: Factset Get Underlying Holdings Information for a Requested Fund Identifer.

params.name: ids
params.description:
List of requested fund identifiers.

***ids limit** = 10 per request*

params.name: date
params.description: Date of holdings expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. The fund-holdings endpoint will default to latest month-end close.

params.name: topn
params.description: Limits number of holdings or holders displayed by the top *n* securities based on positions Market Value. Default is ALL, otherwise use number to limit number.

params.name: assetType
params.description:
Filter holdings by the following major asset classes -
  * **EQ**  = Equity
  * **FI** = Fixed Income
  * **ALL** = ALL

params.name: currency
params.description: Currency code for adjusting prices. Default is Local. For a list of currency ISO codes, visit [Online Assistant Page 1470](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/1470).

items.docs: Gets holdings information for list of fund identifiers. The service allows you to filter by the TopN holdings and Asset Type.

info.name: Factset Get Holdings for a List of Funds.

items.docs: Gets Holding information for a long list of Fund objects.

info.name: Factset Get Security Ownership Data for Requested Security Identifers.

params.name: ids
params.description:
Requested list of security identifiers.

***ids limit** = 1 per request*

.

params.name: holderType
params.description:
Controls the Holder Type of the data returned. By default, the service will return Institutional Holders. Requesting All Holders is not currently supported. Only a single Holder Type is allowed per request.
  * **F** = Institutions
  * **M** = Mutual Funds
  * **S** =  Insiders/Stakeholders
  * **FS** = Institutions/Insiders
  * **B** = Beneficial Owners

params.name: topn
params.description: Limits number of holdings or holders displayed by the top *n* securities based on positions Market Value. Default is ALL, otherwise use number to limit number.

params.name: date
params.description: Date of holdings expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. The fund-holdings endpoint will default to latest month-end close.

params.name: currency
params.description: Currency code for adjusting prices. Default is Local. For a list of currency ISO codes, visit [Online Assistant Page 1470](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/1470).

items.docs: Gets security ownership details and activity for the requested security identifiers. The services allows filtering by "Topn" holders and by holder "type", such as Institutions, Insiders, and Stakeholders.

info.name: Factset Get Security Ownership Data for a List of Requested Securities.

items.docs: Gets security ownership details and activity for the requested security identifiers. The services allows filtering by "Topn" holders and by holder "type", such as Institutions, Insiders, and Stakeholders.
